name: Cannoli (Gtkg62a)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Grated orange or lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, sugar, citrus rind and butter in a bowl and mix well.
2. Gradually add Marsala wine by the teaspoon until the dough is stiff.
3. Chill the dough for 2 hours.
4. Roll the dough on a lightly-floured board into a large rectangle.
5. Cut into 4-inch squares.
6. Wrap each square around cannoli tubes so that two corners fold over and two corners point outward.
7. Brush the touching corners with egg white to ensure they stick together.
8. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown.
9. Remove from the tubes and cool.
10. Fill with the prepared filling.
11. Makes 10 to 12 cannoli. If cannoli tubes are unavailable, make 4-inch diameter tubes out of heavy-duty aluminum foil and fold the dough accordingly.
